reason: Architecture gap analysis shows 5 implemented modules missing from ARCHITECTURE.md: tunnel (src/tunnel.js), CLI (src/cli/setup.js, browser.js), HTTPS/middleware (src/server/cert.js, httpsServer.js, middleware.js), VAD (src/runtime/vad.js), and embed/adapters (src/runtime/embed.js, adapters/). These are all 'missing' or 'partial' status in architecture.json gaps. Architecture match is 88% — documenting these would bring it to ~100%.
proposedChange: Add module sections to ARCHITECTURE.md for: (1) tunnel.js — LAN tunnel capability, (2) src/cli/ — CLI module with setup.js and browser.js, (3) HTTPS/middleware layer — cert.js, httpsServer.js, middleware.js, (4) VAD — src/runtime/vad.js voice activity detection, (5) agentic-embed runtime — src/runtime/embed.js and adapters/
